news.title: Human Eye-Region and Pupil Segmentation Dataset for MEYELens.
news.content: This dataset contains human eye images with pixel-level segmentation masks for the pupil and eye-region.

news.title: Database for Direct Emotional Response (DER) in mice.
news.content: A collection of videos of DER in mice.

news.title: NeuroTOC (Neuroscience Table of Contents)
news.content: A curated selection of intriguing new articles from last month's literature.
